message:
fix(sync,util): best-effort fallback queries, merge robustness, and import fixes

- Fall back to individual queries in best-effort sync mode when batch fails
- Parse backup filenames with regex for more reliable history extraction
- Handle merge deletion of already-absent issues as no-op instead of error
- Add processed count to JSONL import summary output
- Fix markdown import whitespace handling for indented content
- Update hash utility and global flags test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
